query: SELECT COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN summary IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_summary, SUM(CASE WHEN coverImageUrl IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_cover, SUM(CASE WHEN s3CoverUrl IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_s3_cover, SUM(CASE WHEN richSummaryJson IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_rich_summary, SUM(CASE WHEN resourceLinksJson IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_resource_links, SUM(CASE WHEN technicalReferencesJson IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_tech_refs, SUM(CASE WHEN readingNotesJson IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_reading_notes, SUM(CASE WHEN amazonUrl IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_amazon, SUM(CASE WHEN enrichedAt IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as enriched FROM book_profiles
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 46FBtXPMNF6LwZ8.root --database ehSrGoKN2NYhXg8UYLtWGw --execute SELECT COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN summary IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_summary, SUM(CASE WHEN coverImageUrl IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_cover, SUM(CASE WHEN s3CoverUrl IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_s3_cover, SUM(CASE WHEN richSummaryJson IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_rich_summary, SUM(CASE WHEN resourceLinksJson IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_resource_links, SUM(CASE WHEN technicalReferencesJson IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_tech_refs, SUM(CASE WHEN readingNotesJson IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_reading_notes, SUM(CASE WHEN amazonUrl IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_amazon, SUM(CASE WHEN enrichedAt IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as enriched FROM book_profiles
